title: wedelia pratensis
intro: Wedelia pratensis, also known as the Daisy Tansy or Sow Thistle, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Wedelia pratensis include its ability to treat ailments such as dysentery, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
